acceptance_targets: [chapter_07_F004] Pass if revised prose reduces narrative comma-then hinge sentences to no more than two chapter-wide and the cited lines demonstrate at least three different transition strategies by direct reading. Fail if the same hinge structure remains repeated across those beats.

[chapter_07_F005] Pass if the revised chapter uses watch/clock references only at decisive turn points (arrival calculus, stay/leave decision, end-of-night countdown) and at least two of the currently time-coded anxiety beats are re-rendered through non-time sensory experience in the cited spans. Fail if watch/clock mentions remain the dominant anxiety marker across party, balcony, and home scenes.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised prose reduces narrative comma-then hinge sentences to no more than two chapter-wide and the cited lines demonstrate at least three different transition strategies by direct reading. Fail if the same hinge structure remains repeated across those beats.
findings.problem: The chapter overuses comma-then pivoting (", then ...") as a sequencing engine. At current frequency, the construction reads as a prose tic rather than an intentional rhythm choice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Line-edit repeated pivots at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:47, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:103, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:241, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:343, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:381, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:393 with varied syntactic transitions (juxtaposition, subordination, sentence break, or action beat).

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised chapter uses watch/clock references only at decisive turn points (arrival calculus, stay/leave decision, end-of-night countdown) and at least two of the currently time-coded anxiety beats are re-rendered through non-time sensory experience in the cited spans. Fail if watch/clock mentions remain the dominant anxiety marker across party, balcony, and home scenes.
findings.problem: Anika's counting/time stress signature becomes mechanically literal through repeated watch/clock callouts. The motif is valid, but current density flattens variation and reads like token-list reuse instead of evolving interior pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the time motif at structural turns but trim or transform repetitions at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:57, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:143, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:163, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:311 into alternate anxiety vectors (sound, muscle tension, social misread, breath rhythm) while preserving key beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:27, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:251, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:409.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
